spots.title: Wire the DeepBook SDK config
spots.prompt: In src/App.tsx lines 39–58, implement the three helper functions: packageIds(), coinMap(), and poolMap(). These functions extract the on-chain addresses from the sandbox deployment manifest and build the DeepBook SDK configuration objects. Wire {{ pool_subset }} as the pool scope for your viewer.

spots.title: Implement polling loop (TBD)
spots.prompt: TBD in cycle 5+: Implement the polling loop that queries midPrice and level-2 ticks every poll_interval_ms milliseconds.

spots.title: Render the orderbook table (TBD)
spots.prompt: TBD in cycle 5+: Render the bids and asks arrays into an HTML table with price/quantity columns.
